description: DynAccess and DynAccessSet dispatch on key type (int64 → Index, string → KeyStr)
steps: Write TestDynAccess_IntKey, TestDynAccess_StringKey, TestDynAccessSet_IntKey, TestDynAccessSet_StringKey
Run tests, verify they fail (undefined)
Implement DynAccess and DynAccessSet in ops.go
Run tests, verify they pass
Commit

description: Strict boolean — only [1] truthy, only [] falsy, everything else panics
steps: Write TestIsTruthy_One, TestIsTruthy_Empty, TestIsTruthy_Zero_Panics, TestIsTruthy_MultiElement_Panics, TestIsTruthy_String_Panics
Run tests, verify panic tests fail (currently don't panic)
Implement strict IsTruthy in slop_value.go
Fix existing runtime tests that rely on old truthiness
Run all runtime tests, verify pass
Commit
Rename DynKeyAccessExpr → DynAccessExpr, DynKeySetStmt → DynAccessSetStmt in ast.go
Add TOKEN_DOLLAR as postfix operator in parsePostfix()
Add $var = statement dispatch in parseStatement()
Remove @$ handling from parsePostfix() and @$var= from parseStatement()
Remove @(expr) parenthesized index from parsePostfix()
Run parser tests, verify pass
Commit
Update lowerExpr() DynKeyAccessExpr → DynAccessExpr case to call DynAccess
Update lowerStmt() DynKeySetStmt → DynAccessSetStmt case to call DynAccessSet
Run codegen unit tests, verify pass
Commit

description: Reject bare numbers, booleans, null outside [] brackets
steps: Remove TOKEN_INT/UINT/FLOAT, TOKEN_TRUE/FALSE, TOKEN_NULL from parsePrimary()
Write TestParser_RejectBareNumber, TestParser_RejectBareNull, TestParser_RejectBareTrue
Run parser tests, verify rejection tests pass
Fix any existing parser tests that use bare literals
Commit

description: Update all E2E tests for bracketed literals, strict booleans, and $var syntax (~90 changes across ~70 tests)
steps: Replace bare numbers (= 0, == 0, != 0) with bracketed equivalents
Replace bare null with [null]
Rewrite strict boolean violations (if [0], if "", ![0], if result)
Replace @(ident) with $ident, @$var with $var
Add temp variables for compound @(expr) cases
Run all E2E tests, verify pass
Commit

description: Update example .slop files for new syntax
steps: Update all examples/ files for bracketed literals, strict booleans, $var syntax
Commit

description: Update PRD, architecture, patterns, roadmap for all syntax changes
steps: Update PRD operator table, boolean semantics, examples
Update architecture doc
Add patterns.md entries for syntax changes
Commit

description: Remove dead IndexKey/IndexKeySet and old @$ parser paths
steps: Remove IndexKey() and IndexKeySet() from runtime
Remove any remaining old @$ code paths from parser
Run all tests, verify pass
Commit

description: semantic mutation tests — IndexSet, DynAccessSet, KeySetStr, Push, Pop, RemoveAt
steps: IndexSet single-element unwraps to raw value
IndexSet multi-element stores nested SlopValue
IndexSet with string, null, empty array, float
IndexSet boundaries (first, last, out-of-bounds panic)
IndexSet read-back, length unchanged, double set, loop, concat
DynAccessSet int key single/multi, string key single/multi
DynAccessSet float key panics, multi-element key panics
KeySetStr update existing, add new, single unwraps, multi nests
Push single/multi/empty/null/nested/string, length after push
Pop basic/single/empty-panic/return-value/roundtrip
RemoveAt middle/first/last/single/out-of-bounds-panic/return-value

description: semantic equality tests — deep equality, cross-type, null, hashmap, ordered comparisons
steps: Same-type scalar equality (int, float, uint, string)
Cross-type comparisons return [] without panic
Multi-element deep equality and length mismatch
Nested array equality and nested-vs-flat
Null equality (null==null, null!=int, arrays with null)
Hashmap equality (same structure, different values, different keys)
Inequality != operator
Equality results used in boolean context
After mutation (IndexSet, Push, build separately)
Ordered comparisons (lt, gt, lte, gte, string, float)
Ordered comparison panics (multi-element, null, type mismatch)

description: semantic format tests — str(), |> no newline, FormatValue after operations, hashmaps
steps: str() output for int, float, uint, multi, empty, string, null, mixed, nested, true, false
|> concatenation without newline, explicit newline, multiple statements
FormatValue after index access, pop, removeAt, slice, concat, unique, contains, length
FormatValue with hashmap keys (single/multi), values after mutation

description: semantic boolean tests — IsTruthy strictness, logical operators, true/false keywords
steps: Valid booleans: [1] truthy, [] falsy, true/false keywords
Invalid booleans panic: [0], [2], [-1], string, float, multi, null, uint
Logical AND/OR/NOT with valid operands
Logical operators with invalid operands panic
true/false keyword semantics: str(), equality, bracket-nesting
Boolean results from == used in if

description: semantic null tests — null succeeds/panics in every operator context
steps: Null succeeds: assignment, str, stdout, equality, length, contains, index, hashmap
Null panics in arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %, **, right-side
Null panics in unary/boolean: negate, not, if, and, or
Null panics in ordered comparisons: <, >, <=, >=, right-side
Null panics in iteration (single-element)
Null edge cases: multi-null iteration, unique, remove, concat, mixed iteration

description: semantic arithmetic tests — type safety, element-wise, division by zero, negate, precedence
steps: Type consistency: int+int, float+float, uint+uint, cross-type panics
Length mismatch panics, empty+empty succeeds
Multi-element element-wise: add, sub, mul, div, mod, pow
Division by zero panics for int, uint, float, second element
Negate: int, multi, zero, float, double-negate, uint-to-int, empty, string-panics
Mod edge cases: basic, float-panics
Pow edge cases: zero exp, zero base, negative exp
Precedence: mul before add, parens override, negate in expression
Type mismatch across all ops: sub, mul, div, mod, pow

description: semantic array ops tests — index, slice, concat, remove, contains, unique, length
steps: Index access: first, last, out-of-bounds panic, dynamic, nested, after push, string
Slice: basic, empty range, full, last element, does not mutate, out-of-bounds panic, hi<lo panic
Concat: basic, left/right/both empty, does not mutate, strings, mixed, nested
Remove: first occurrence, not found, empty val, does not mutate, remove null
Contains: found, not found, empty array, null found, multi-operand panic, in conditional
Unique: basic, empty, single, all same, does not mutate, null dedup, mixed types, strings
Length: basic, empty, null, nested, after push, in expression

description: semantic hashmap tests — declaration, key access/set, ##/@@, dynamic access, iteration, functions, equality
steps: Declaration and access: basic, empty, single key, key not found panic, string value
Key set: update existing, add new, single unwraps, multi nests
## and @@: keys, values, after add/update, on non-map arrays
Dynamic access via $: string key read/write, int key on array, int key on map
Hashmap iteration: keys, values
Hashmap in functions: pass, return, mutate (pointer), build in loop
Hashmap equality: same structure, different values

description: semantic control flow tests — if/else, for-in, infinite loop, functions, scoping, combined
steps: If/else: true branch, else branch, nested, comparison, logical, not, chained
For-in: basic, empty array, strings, nested, with break, with mutation
Infinite loop + break: counter, nested break, break after mutation
Functions: return value, early return, recursive, mutates array, local scope, multi-assign, nested calls
Variable scoping: reassignment, param shadow, loop var scope
Combined: build array in loop, error propagation, nested fn calls, array ops in loop, hashmap in loop
